instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly implement the UI matching these design guidelines. Focus heavily on a dense, functional UI for the map editor (Control Room layout) and a high-impact, expansive layout for the marketing page. Use raw HTML/Tailwind for marketing, Shadcn UI for dashboard/editor components. The entire app MUST be in Russian.

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-black tracking-tighter leading-none

surfaces_and_containers.navigation_header: backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60 border-b border-white/10 z-50 fixed w-full top-0
surfaces_and_containers.cards_dashboard: bg-[#141414] border border-white/10 p-6 rounded-md shadow-sm transition-all hover:-translate-y-1 hover:border-white/20
surfaces_and_containers.editor_toolbars: bg-[#0A0A0A]/80 backdrop-blur-lg border border-white/10 rounded-lg shadow-2xl p-2
surfaces_and_containers.properties_panel: bg-[#141414] border-l border-white/10 h-full flex flex-col p-4

buttons.primary: bg-amber-500 hover:bg-amber-600 text-black font-semibold rounded-md transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/20 hover:border-white/50 text-white rounded-md transition-all

marketing_page.hero_section: min-h-screen flex flex-col justify-center items-start pt-24 pb-12 relative overflow-hidden px-8 lg:px-24

map_editor.wrapper: w-screen h-screen overflow-hidden bg-[#0A0A0A] relative flex
map_editor.top_bar: absolute top-4 left-4 right-4 h-14 flex items-center justify-between z-40 backdrop-blur-md bg-black/50 border border-white/10 rounded-lg px-4
map_editor.tools_sidebar: absolute top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 left-4 w-12 flex flex-col gap-2 z-40 bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/10 rounded-lg p-2
map_editor.layers_panel: absolute top-24 bottom-4 right-4 w-80 z-40 bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/10 rounded-lg flex flex-col overflow-hidden
map_editor.canvas_area: absolute inset-0 z-10 w-full h-full cursor-grab active:cursor-grabbing

components_strategy.forms: Use Shadcn Form, Input, Select. Customize borders to white/10, background to transparent.
components_strategy.modals: Use Shadcn Dialog. Background #141414, border white/10, sharp or md border radius.
components_strategy.map_canvas: HTML5 Canvas or SVG based approach for drawing polygons, placing absolute positioned markers, and rendering the background image.

interactions_and_motion.hover_states: Text color brightens, subtle borders fade in, background receives 5% white overlay.
interactions_and_motion.page_transitions: Framer motion fade in (opacity 0 to 1, y: 10 to 0).
interactions_and_motion.editor_panels: Slide in from edges on mount.

hero_background.description: Dark topo grid pattern, use as repeating background or full cover with opacity 0.3 on the marketing page.

marketing_showcase.description: Hero map UI mockup. Use this on the right side of the landing page hero section (or as a large center graphic) to showcase what the platform builds.
